text: I like the name! (I know what is tutuca since I come from Argentina and it was my favourite snack when I was a kid)

text: fyi, the “drag and drop” example is difficult to follow because numbers don’t move; I kept looking for the numbers to get reordered and it didn’t happen. (you do drag the number with the label, after all.)

text: :thinking_face: maybe I should make them different colors or something, the number is the item index in the list, it changes on drop. any other idea that may make it clearer?
